steps.title: Keep element and source pattern
steps.content: The example begins with iron from AST dust at 28%. To illustrate the stated pattern, the completion should keep the element the same and compare it with iron from faster-moving HTC or OCC dust at a higher rate.

steps.title: Reject mismatched data
steps.content: Choice A uses another slow-moving source. Choice B switches to sodium. Choice D switches to sodium and stays with a slow-moving source. The matching data use iron from a faster-moving source with a higher ablation rate. The answer is C.
